title: Month Navigation on Public Calendar View

posts.author: julie.stubbs (Julie Stubbs)
posts.cookedHtml: From a board’s calendar view, you are able to get a shareable link so that folks without Monday accounts can view this calendar (i.e. schedule of upcoming events, marketing efforts, etc.). This public monthly view used to have an option where you can toggle to a different month - example: It’s Friday, August 30 and you can look at the calendar, toggle to September, and see what’s up and coming. Right now that month navigation feature has been removed - so it’s Friday, August 30. You look at the calendar and can’t see what the company has planned for next week. Please bring this simple feature back!!
